name: Trout Mancy W/Lemon Butter Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Season trout with salt and pepper.
2. Dredge the trout in flour.
3. Heat a little butter in a pan and saute the trout for 4 minutes per side. Remove from the pan and place on a warm platter.
4. In the remaining drippings, add the crawfish tails and capers. Saute until hot.
5. Pour over the fish.
6. In another pan, combine a little flour, beef stock, and lemon juice. Whisk until well blended.
7. Remove from heat and gradually add butter while whisking.
8. Allow the sauce to melt completely.
9. Strain the sauce if desired.
10. Serve the trout with the lemon butter sauce.
